name: Ascent
description: Rising staircases re-orienting their climb on every seed.

code.style: --rule: ( --rot: @pick(0deg, 90deg, 180deg, 270deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(0 100%, 0 66.6%, 33.3% 66.6%, 33.3% 33.3%, 66.6% 33.3%, 66.6% 0, 100% 0, 100% 100%); clip-path: polygon(0 100%, 0 66.6%, 33.3% 66.6%, 33.3% 33.3%, 66.6% 33.3%, 66.6% 0, 100% 0, 100% 100%); -webkit-transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); } -webkit-transition: ease 400ms; transition: ease 400ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
